case_title: PACIFIC ACQUISITION CORP. DBA STONESTOWN APTS. vs. NAKAHARA, ISSEI et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC ACQUISITION CORP. DBA STONESTOWN APTS. AS TO DEFENDANT NAKAHARA, ISSEI NAKAHARA, HIROSHI
